DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARINE EXCHANGE OF THE SAN FRANCISCO BAY REGION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO EFFECT SERVICE ON DEFENDANT IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE PROVISIONS OF THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND OSC RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION ISSUED ON APRIL 30, 2014. (SEE CCP 527(D)(2). THEREFORE, THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER ISSUED ON APRIL 30, 2014 IS DISSOLVED. (CCP 527(D)(3).) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. (302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Case Management Conference on July 29, 2015, at 11:00 am in Dept. 612. Appearance via Courtcall by John David Giffin, Esq. for Plaintiff and telephonic appearance by Self-Represented Defendant, Rob B. Strahan. After hearing arguments, the Court ordered that the matter will be heard at the Order to Show Cause which was previously set for Oct-06-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Defendant will have the opportunity to retain counsel. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order is denied. Plaintiff failed to effect service on Defendant in compliance with the provisions of the Temporary Restraining Order and OSC re: Preliminary Injunction issued on April 30, 2014. (See CCP 527(d)(2). Therefore, the Temporary Restraining Order issued on April 30, 2014 is dissolved. (CCP 527(d)(3).) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
